NewsSignal.rationale: Product launch and supplier upgrade outweigh a single China downgrade.

MacroSignal.rationale: Mixed signals: steady Fed but higher yields and a risk-off geopolitical tone.

TechnicalSignal.rationale: Price above MA20/MA50 with positive MACD; RSI not yet overbought.

MemoryContext.lesson: Launch-driven optimism has historically held for ~1 week absent macro shocks.

ResearchStance.bull_case: Entry thesis intact; momentum still positive.
ResearchStance.bear_case: Some moderation in news flow, but nothing that invalidates the thesis.

ResearchStance.bear_case: Elevated macro risk and China demand questions could cap upside.
China demand deteriorating and macro turning risk-off; entry thesis broken.
